summary: P0 UI bug fixes verified - All tests PASS. Both login flows work correctly, Admin tab visibility is properly controlled by is_admin flag, and partner_code displays correctly in profile.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.tsx login fallback implementation is correct - tries partner-login first, falls back to customer-login on 403 'Access denied'
TopNav.tsx line 56 correctly uses {user?.is_admin && ...} conditional for Admin tab visibility
Profile.tsx correctly displays user?.partner_code with fallback to '—' for null values
/me endpoint in auth.py correctly resolves partner_code from tenant table using tenant_id
seed_data_creation: Used existing test credentials: testcustomer@test.com (customer) and admin@automateaccounts.local (admin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 UI bugs are FIXED. Customer login works via fallback to /auth/customer-login when partner-login returns 403. Admin tab visibility controlled by is_admin field in user object (line 56 TopNav.tsx). Partner code displays correctly in profile for customers (resolves from tenant via tenant_id). Platform_admin shows '—' for partner_code since their tenant_id is null - this is expected behavior.

bug_1_admin_tab_visibility.description: Customers (non-admin users) should NOT see the Admin tab in navigation
bug_1_admin_tab_visibility.evidence: Customer login returns is_admin=false, TopNav.tsx uses {user?.is_admin && ...} conditional, Admin tab not rendered for customers
bug_1_admin_tab_visibility.test_result: Customer nav shows: Store, Articles (NO Admin). Admin nav shows: Store, Articles, Admin

bug_2_partner_code_display.description: Partner code (partner_id) should display correctly in user profile for all users
bug_2_partner_code_display.evidence: Customer profile shows 'automate-accounts'. Admin (platform_admin with tenant_id:null) shows '—' which is expected.
bug_2_partner_code_display.test_result: /me endpoint returns partner_code resolved from tenant table. Profile.tsx displays it correctly.
